{{Quote|That's interesting. I wonder if the Cantina reference was a hint, not a brush off. Go there and check it out. I think that my buddy Trace is in there.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:GtMFW" />}}
'''Trace''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he lived on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]].<ref name="SWG:GtMFW" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> his friend [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] arrived on the station with [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. The ship needed repairs after a skirmish with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces but the staff of the station was not eager to help. Trace informed the spacer that the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] was present on the station, with Solo on his top target list, and that was the reason why nobody would help the smuggler. The spacer therefore rushed to find replacement parts for the ''Millennium Falcon'' while Solo and Chewbacca hurried to repair the starship. They finally left Tansarii Point Station before Boba Fett could even notice their presence on the station.<ref name="SWG:GtMFW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Trace appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:GtMFW" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Trace was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
